entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops subject to pest infestations resulting in moderate to heavy losses

entities.name: PEST SPECIES
entities.description: Organisms that cause depredations and losses in pulse crops

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where pulses are attacked by various categories of pests

entities.name: FLOWER AND POD FEEDERS
entities.description: A category of pests that feed on the flowers and pods of pulses

entities.name: STEM/LEAF TISSUE BORERS
entities.description: A category of pests that bore into the stem and leaf tissues of pulses

entities.name: DEFOLIATORS
entities.description: A category of pests that remove foliage from pulse crops

entities.name: SAP FEEDERS
entities.description: A category of pests that feed on the sap of pulse crops

entities.name: SUBTERRANEAN PESTS
entities.description: A category of pests that attack pulse crops underground

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A specific pulse crop targeted for pest problem analysis and management

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A specific pulse crop targeted for pest problem analysis and management

entities.name: PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The application of principles and methods to control pest problems in pulse crops

entities.name: PEST PROBLEMS
entities.description: The state of crop infestation and resulting losses caused by pest species
